public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as minor envoy.
manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. In Mimolot, that reads as someone scholarly, proprietary, and intellectually guarded, weighing knowledge against access and control, and the habits of a minor envoy still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of minor envoy in and around House Mimolot, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep House Mimolot workable through the obligations of minor envoy while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Mimolot.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around House Mimolot, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of minor envoy visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Quillan Spellward needs help with a problem in House Mimolot that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.
Getting involved with Quillan Spellward can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Quillan Spellward carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

In Mimolot, that reads as someone scholarly, proprietary, and intellectually guarded, weighing knowledge against access and control, and the habits of a minor envoy still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Minor Envoy, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Mimolot.
what_they_refuse: Quillan Spellward refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Minor Envoy too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Quillan Spellward can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Quillan Spellward adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Quillan Spellward is Known locally through day-to-day work as minor envoy. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Minor Envoy.
